subject: Set multicloud-k8s image to 0.6.0
commit_message:
Set multicloud-k8s image to 0.6.0

Update image for Frankfurt release.

Change-Id: Idc26b081694b8d7270fea81a30d595d41b6b9240
Issue-ID: OOM-2397
Signed-off-by: Eric Multanen <eric.w.multanen@intel.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

I suppose the multicloud-k8s healthcheck will pass once this revert patch is merged: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/107183

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> I suppose the multicloud-k8s healthcheck will pass once this revert patch is merged: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/107183

Yes, I also think so, I'll ping reviewers in that review.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

healtcheck is failing (like in 99% of the gating)

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> healtcheck is failing (like in 99% of the gating)

Hi Sylvain,

It is due to healthcheck revert not being merged yet (it has +2 already) - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/107183. Robot's healthcheck calls wrong url and thus it fails.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

We need to merge it ASAP as it blocks integration tests of the CNF/CDS use case.

Patch Set 1:

let's wait for @Morgan (but he's off today), brian or Daniel review / merge on other review and we'll redeploy to check this one
